Item: Newsletter promise is specific to a reader outcome
Landing page names the publishing cadence
Primary signup form appears above the fold on mobile
CTA card is repeated after proof or sample issue section
Page shows author or publication proof
Every launch link uses source medium campaign and content
Title description image and canonical URL are checked
Snippet partials are installed in the active theme
Signup form is tested with a tagged URL
No hidden backlinks tracking beacons or external scripts are added
